sections.paragraph:
Original: חבשׁ

Transliteration: châbash

Phonetic: khaw-bash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tie, bind, bind on, bind up, saddle, restrain, bandage, govern
    1. (Qal)
      1. to bind, bind on
      2. to bind up
    2. (Piel) to bind, restrain
    3. (Pual) to be bound up

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 599

Part(s) of speech: Verb
